Shield of Dragonkind  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 40
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +15 HP: +75 MANA: +75
SV FIRE: +7 SV DISEASE: +7 SV COLD: +7 SV MAGIC: +7 SV POISON: +7
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Shield of Dragonkind
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 40
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +15 HP: +75 MANA: +75
SV FIRE: +7 SV DISEASE: +7 SV COLD: +7 SV MAGIC: +7 SV POISON: +7
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Hob
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 11:41:21
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

NPC Name

Temple of Veeshan

Just got this shield while raiding in Ntov with guild. is a really nice upgrade from my old one. +75mana & +75hps are the bomb and the 40 ac & +15wis is the icing on the cake.

# May 10 2001 at 12:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Class specific loot is so nice, less of a headache for raid leaders =)

Deceiver Mindreaver
Level 60 Enchanter, Prexus

and yes, I know this sheild is cleric only
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 09 2001 at 8:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ya know... just once in a great while if druids would be allowed to use an item with more that 2 wisdom it would thrill me to the brink of ******. 15 wisdom and 40 ac! a shield that ONLY a cleric can use? what in the HELL gives this shield the requirement that only a cleric could use. arrrrrrrrrggggghhhhh!
check here and stop whining
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 3:20 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
http://eqdb.allakhazam.com/itemsearch.html?classes=8&race=4&type=Any+Slot&level=&price=&order=wis&qt=b

300, yes, 300 items with over 2 wis that druid can use, stop ******** and enjoy the game jesus
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 09 2001 at 10:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) lol i just love it when people make baseless claims, then have it blow up on em... stupid fools ruining the game for everyone else...

QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 6:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965846855
151 posts
Actually, its inferior in every single stat than the Cleric shield! 3 less wisdom, 7 less AC, less than half as much mana, 2 less on the saves. What a rip!

Joking people. :) Druid armor is always inferior to Shaman and Cleric counterparts, though not neccessarily on the secondary stats. The curse of being the best or second best soloist in the game.
▲ Page top
RE: one more shaft for the druids

__DEL__1591764939224

QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 9:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750926490
95 posts
It's probably since clerics are higher up on the ladder then most every other class then possibly warrior in neccesity. I play a hybrid, so getting the shaft numbs you to the whole cleric/warrior/rogue tribunal that dominates things in the long run... yes I am bitter =P
▲ Page top
Cleric Only??
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 5:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759056685
168 posts
Since when would the words "Of Dragonkind" make ya think of Cleric Only? It's like saying no other class would wear something of the name...Cleric only should have a religious tone to it rather than Dragonkind, which suggests Uber (and ever class likes Uber, don't they? -=P )

BTW...AC40 Shield that weighs only 1.0? OMG..

I just want one, that's all -=P
▲ Page top
RE: Cleric Only??
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 7:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754773569
Scholar
21 posts
The name doesn't matter, my friend. What difference does it make? Would you really be less jealous if it was named "Shield of UberHealers"?
▲ Page top
RE: Cleric Only??
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 11:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965790794
328 posts
Name does matter for some...and to name an item like this for clerics is kinda weird..not wrong...just weird. I saw the name, then saw just cleric and immediately was puzzled. They shoulda added Paladin to it if this is a clerical shield. A Paladin would get the most use out of this (IMHO).
▲ Page top
RE: Cleric Only??
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 2:43 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I hate to tell you a cleric would get as much or more use out of this. We don't get good defensive skills and we end up takeing more hits than a paladin in balanced groups (unless that paladin is tanking which does not happen alot since most groups usually wait till they have a warrior if they go into higher lvl zones) or even in certain raid groups IE puller group cleric that has to heal the monk/rogue as they are coming in. And i bet if you wait there will probably be a shield for Paladins come out of ToV already saw the druid shield from there about the same stats

Ilain
52 Vicar
Primal Orders E'ci

# Dec 12 2001 at 5:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249641124
79 posts
i second that. having uber gear doesnt make a better player, and in my opinion sometimes makes you a worse player, as you rely to much on equipment, rather than skill. i've F'd away my fair share of heals and saves but it's because of inexpeirience and bad timing not lack of equipment
